hardRules: RIASEC precise best-career recommendation is forbidden
Big Five precise career matching is forbidden
AI precise career planning is forbidden
career fit score must not be described as hiring, income, success, or placement guarantee
snapshot recommendation must not be described as a live personalized recommender
sitemap/llms/schema must not be described as a true graph
frontend local ranking must not be described as a recommendation engine
public claims require backend support, visible runtime evidence, or explicit boundary status
defaultForbiddenClaims: RIASEC 精准推荐最适合职业
Big Five 精准匹配职业
career fit score 等于录用/成功保证
snapshot recommendation 等于 personalized recommender
frontend local ranking 等于 recommendation engine
allowedWithBoundary: RIASEC 描述职业兴趣方向
Big Five 解释行为倾向和职场风格
MBTI 描述偏好、表达风格、身份感
Career Graph 使用职业结构、任务、技能和证据生成评分
MBTI career recommendation 作为 snapshot-based career direction support

rows.backendSupport: scale catalog and RIASEC result/history/share surfaces
rows.runtimeEvidence: canonical RIASEC test route and RIASEC history/share affordances
rows.blocksWhen: copy presents RIASEC as precise best-career recommendation
rows.requiredAuthority: backend scale lookup plus visible result/report evidence

rows.claimText: RIASEC 精准推荐最适合职业

requiredTokens: RIASEC 精准推荐最适合职业

rows.backendSupport: not established as complete career recommender
rows.runtimeEvidence: no public runtime proof for precise best-career recommendation
rows.blocksWhen: public runtime, SEO, FAQ, CTA, or paywall frames RIASEC as precise best-career recommender
rows.requiredAuthority: future explicit backend recommendation contract, claim gate, and visible evidence

rows.claimText: Big Five explains workplace behavior tendencies and trait style.
rows.backendSupport: Big Five trait-vector report and frontend interpretation layer
rows.runtimeEvidence: OCEAN domain interpretation includes definitions, bands, tradeoffs, and scene lines
rows.blocksWhen: copy treats Big Five trait score as a deterministic career match
rows.requiredAuthority: Big Five trait/report contract plus visible behavior interpretation

rows.claimText: Big Five 精准匹配职业

requiredTokens: Big Five 精准匹配职业

rows.backendSupport: not established as complete career recommender
rows.runtimeEvidence: no public runtime proof for precise Big Five career matching
rows.blocksWhen: public runtime frames Big Five as precise career matching engine
rows.requiredAuthority: future explicit backend recommendation contract, claim gate, and visible evidence

rows.claimText: MBTI describes preference, expression style, and identity language.
rows.backendSupport: MBTI report payload and content pack surfaces
rows.runtimeEvidence: preview semantics render bounded MBTI report modules
rows.blocksWhen: copy describes MBTI as deterministic destiny, diagnosis, hiring screen, or guaranteed outcome
rows.requiredAuthority: MBTI report/content authority plus visible report sections

rows.claimText: Career Graph uses occupation structure, tasks, skills, score components, and evidence for scoring when backend claim permissions allow it.
rows.backendSupport: career bundle, explainability, score bundle, and claim permissions
rows.runtimeEvidence: career explainability panel and display surface enforce bounded claim permissions
rows.blocksWhen: frontend emits graph or score claims without backend permission and visible evidence
rows.requiredAuthority: career backend bundle plus claim_permissions and explainability

rows.claimText: MBTI career recommendation is snapshot-based career direction support.
rows.backendSupport: backend career recommendation bundle and explainability endpoint
rows.runtimeEvidence: recommendation index renders backend card while suppressing personalized status
rows.blocksWhen: snapshot recommendation is described as live personalized recommender
rows.requiredAuthority: backend recommendation bundle plus visible snapshot boundary

rows.claimText: snapshot recommendation 等于 personalized recommender
rows.backendSupport: backend snapshot bundle exists; live personalization is not proven
rows.blocksWhen: public copy, schema, CTA, or paywall equates snapshot recommendations with live personalized recommendation
rows.requiredAuthority: future personalization contract, runtime profile signals, claim gate, and visible evidence

rows.claimText: Career fit score is decision support with caveats.

requiredTokens: This is not a guarantee of hiring, income, or long-term outcomes.
Career interest tests and personality tests do not guarantee casting or income.

rows.backendSupport: career display surface claim permissions and decision card caveat
rows.runtimeEvidence: fixture includes explicit fit caveat and non-guarantee language
rows.blocksWhen: fit score is displayed as success, hiring, income, admission, or placement guarantee
rows.requiredAuthority: backend score bundle plus visible boundary notice

rows.claimText: career fit score 等于录用/成功保证

requiredTokens: This is not a guarantee of hiring, income, or long-term outcomes.
职业兴趣测试和人格测试不能保证试镜成功。

rows.backendSupport: claim permissions explicitly require boundary caveats
rows.blocksWhen: public runtime implies fit score guarantees hiring, income, career success, or placement
rows.requiredAuthority: not allowed under current PRAC claim boundary

rows.claimText: GEO readiness means visible evidence and answerability, not hidden schema or AI-precise planning.

requiredTokens: career suggestions are decision support, not placement guarantees

rows.backendSupport: answer_surface_v1 and visible evidence standard when available
rows.runtimeEvidence: GEO spec requires visible evidence first
rows.blocksWhen: GEO claim relies on hidden schema, hidden FAQ, or invisible evidence
rows.requiredAuthority: visible Evidence Container plus answer surface grounding

requiredTokens: not a schema type by itself

rows.backendSupport: not established as AI career planning runtime
rows.runtimeEvidence: Evidence Container spec is answerability standard, not AI planning runtime
rows.blocksWhen: public runtime claims precise AI career planning or AI career coach capability

requiredTokens: measurement surface, not a source of SEO truth
Do not use this generator to widen sitemap or llms exposure
Frontend graph hardcode cannot become public graph truth.

rows.backendSupport: discoverability and graph authority are separate
rows.runtimeEvidence: URL inventory and fallback inventory explicitly separate measurement/exposure from truth
rows.blocksWhen: copy, report, or docs present sitemap, llms, or schema exposure as a true semantic graph
rows.requiredAuthority: backend/CMS graph contract and governed edges

rows.claimText: frontend local ranking 等于 recommendation engine

requiredTokens: no longer returns local recommendation truth from the consumer layer
frontend fallback cannot become recommendation truth

rows.backendSupport: local frontend ranker is not public authority
rows.runtimeEvidence: contract returns no local recommendation truth from consumer layer
rows.blocksWhen: frontend local ranking is exposed as recommendation engine or recommendation truth
rows.requiredAuthority: backend recommendation contract plus governed explanation

rows.claimText: Report/paywall value describes access, modules, and retained report surfaces, not guaranteed outcomes.

requiredTokens: No guaranteed outcomes or deterministic destiny claims.

rows.backendSupport: report access and preview module surfaces
rows.runtimeEvidence: preview semantics distinguish free, preview, and paid content without outcome guarantee
rows.blocksWhen: paywall or report copy promises career, hiring, income, or life outcome guarantees
rows.requiredAuthority: report access entitlement plus visible module boundary

rows.claimText: Paywall/report value claims require access entitlement truth and must not promise outcomes.

requiredTokens: No guaranteed outcomes or deterministic destiny claims.

rows.backendSupport: report access, modules_allowed, and entitlement surfaces
rows.runtimeEvidence: preview contract separates allowed modules from preview modules
rows.blocksWhen: paywall value claim bypasses entitlement truth or promises outcome guarantees
rows.requiredAuthority: backend report access and entitlement state

rows.claimText: Internal strategy or readiness labels are not public claims unless backed by public runtime evidence.

requiredTokens: This snapshot does not change runtime SEO behavior.
must never widen sitemap or llms exposure by itself

rows.backendSupport: not public-facing unless surfaced through governed runtime
rows.blocksWhen: internal readiness labels are exposed as public user or GEO claims
rows.requiredAuthority: explicit public runtime surface and visible evidence
